tags.name: uui-box
tags.description: A layout box for grouping elements, as well its possible to append a header, with a headline or other elements to the box.

attributes.name: headline
attributes.description: Headline for this box, can also be set via the `headline` slot.

attributes.name: headline-variant
attributes.description:
Changes the headline variant for accessibility for this box.
Notice this does not change the visual representation of the headline. (Umbraco recommends displaying a h5 size headline in the UUI-BOX)

properties.name: headline
properties.description: Headline for this box, can also be set via the `headline` slot.

properties.name: headlineVariant
properties.description:
Changes the headline variant for accessibility for this box.
Notice this does not change the visual representation of the headline. (Umbraco recommends displaying a h5 size headline in the UUI-BOX)

slots.name: headline
slots.description: headline area, this area is placed within the headline tag which is located inside the header. Use this to ensure the right headline styling.

slots.name: header
slots.description: header area, use this for things that are not the headline but are located in the header.

slots.name: header-actions
slots.description: right-side of the box header, use this to append some actions that are general for the topic of this box.
area for the content of the box

cssProperties.name: --uui-box-border-width
cssProperties.description: overwrite the box border, default is 0

cssProperties.name: --uui-box-box-shadow
cssProperties.description: overwrite the box shadow, default is var(--uui-shadow-depth-1)

cssProperties.name: --uui-box-border-radius
cssProperties.description: overwrite the box border-radius, default is var(--uui-border-radius)

cssProperties.name: --uui-box-border-color
cssProperties.description: overwrites the box border colorm default is var(--uui-color-divider-standalone)
